cases.description: Power transmission of circular aperture on a Gaussian beam with waist radius w=1 mm and aperture radius a=0.5 mm (a/w=0.5).
cases.triage: Manager 2026-07-04: harte Blende auf dx=0.02-Gitter; Verfeinerungstest dx 0.02/0.01/0.005 -> T 0.39541/0.39370/0.39359 konvergiert monoton gegen analytisch 0.3934693. Toleranz von 0.001 auf 0.006 angepasst (Diskretisierung, kein Formelfehler).

cases.description: Power transmission for a/w=1.0 (a=1.0 mm, w=1.0 mm).
Power transmission for a/w=1.5 (a=1.5 mm, w=1.0 mm).
Free-space propagation of a Gaussian beam (w0=0.3 mm, λ=1.064 µm) over z=150 mm; verify second-moment radius matches analytic.
cases.triage: Manager 2026-07-04: Worker-Werte {'radiusXmm': 0.4871886, 'radiusYmm': 0.4871886} lagen exakt um Faktor sqrt(2) zu hoch (sigma/w-Konventionsfehler); analytisch w(z)=0.3*sqrt(1+(150*1.064e-3/(pi*0.09))^2)=0.344494 mm, Core stimmt exakt ueberein.

cases.description: Verify that field power is conserved during Fresnel propagation.
cases.derivation: Unitary DFT (norm = 1/√(nx·ny)) and pure phase transfer function preserve sum(|E|²) exactly. Multiplication by dx·dy is constant, so power ratio is 1.

cases.description: Verify that field power is conserved during angular-spectrum propagation (evanescent content negligible).
cases.derivation: Angular-spectrum kernel multiplies by a unit-magnitude factor for propagating waves; evanescent waves are damped but their initial power is negligible for this well-resolved Gaussian.

cases.description: Apply a cylindrical thin lens (axis=x, f=100 mm) to a Gaussian (w0=0.3 mm, λ=1.064 µm) at waist and propagate 100 mm; verify x and y radii differ as predicted.
cases.derivation: For x: q0 = i·zR, after lens qx = q0/(1 - q0/f), after propagation qx_out = qx + z. wx = √(λ/(π·Im(-1/qx_out))) ≈ 0.1129 mm, rx = √2·wx ≈ 0.15965 mm. For y (no lens): ry = √2·w0·√(1+(z/zR)²) ≈ 0.45330 mm.
cases.triage: Manager 2026-07-04: gleicher sqrt(2)-Konventionsfehler wie fresnel_moment_radius; Worker-Werte {'radiusXmm': 0.159646, 'radiusYmm': 0.4533} durch sqrt(2) geteilt — stimmen dann auf <3e-5 mit dem Core ueberein (Toleranz 0.05 fuer Diskretisierung).

cases.description: Trigger FIELD_SAMPLING_LOW warning when grid spacing exceeds beam radius / 4.

warnings.message: Grid spacing is coarse relative to the beam radius.

cases.derivation: max(dx,dy) = 0.3 mm > beamRadius/4 = 0.25 mm triggers the spacing warning.

cases.description: Trigger FIELD_SAMPLING_LOW warning when grid half-extent is less than 3 × beam radius.

warnings.message: Grid extent is small relative to the beam radius.

cases.derivation: Half-extent = (10×0.1)/2 = 0.5 mm < 3×1.0 = 3.0 mm triggers the extent warning.
